evidence_set.name: KnowBe4 Module Based Summary
evidence_set.instructions: Script: module_based_summary.sh. Commands executed: KnowBe4 API calls for user training data and enrollments
evidence_set.description: Module-level training completion summary across all active enrollments. Aggregates by training module name with per-module assignment, completion, and rate metrics.
